tasks.title: core/schedule: vendor-neutral maintenance/freeze window + scheduled-job model, the WindowGuard seam, and the fail-closed-safe MaintenanceWindow query

scenarios: A maintenance window and scheduled jobs are derived from real scheduler events
A change-freeze overrides an overlapping maintenance window
Outside a sanctioned window the actuation is deferred to POLL_PAUSE
An unreadable schedule fails closed to outside the window

tasks.title: modules/schedule/cronicle: native read-only Cronicle REST connector (X-API-Key SecretRef, re-read-by-id) deriving the core/schedule Calendar

scenarios: A maintenance window and scheduled jobs are derived from real scheduler events
The connector re-reads each event by id and reflects an upstream change
The API key is a sealed SecretRef and a wrong key fails closed
The connector reads over a native HTTP client and actuates nothing
